assertions.name: identifies_memoization_issue
assertions.description: Agent identifies missing memoization: useMemo for sorting, React.memo for ProductCard, or useCallback for handler

assertions.name: identifies_inline_function_issue
assertions.description: Agent identifies inline onAddToCart causing re-render on every parent render

assertions.name: identifies_grid_responsive_issue
assertions.description: Agent notes grid-cols-3 without responsive breakpoints hurts mobile

assertions.name: mentions_web_vitals
assertions.description: Agent mentions INP, CLS, or web-vitals measurement
